programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One With the Morning After
programs.desc: A remorseful Ross tries to prevent Rachel from learning his disturbing secret; Monica, Phoebe, Chandler and Joey spend a night eavesdropping.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One Without the Ski Trip
programs.desc: Excluded from Rachel's ski trip with her pals, lonely Ross visits his ex-wife (Jane Sibbett); Phoebe's cab runs out of gas and the stranded gang turns to Ross for help.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy; Bernadette and Wolowitz have a hard time deciding who should stay at home with the kids and who should go back to work.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Penny gets the opportunity to host Bill Gates at work when his company wants to partner with hers; Leonard, Koothrappali and Wolowitz do everything in their power to meet him; Sheldon thinks he is the victim of a prank.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Leonard decides to run against Sheldon for president of the tenants' association; Bernadette encourages Wolowitz and Koothrappali to find the owner of a drone after they find it in the backyard.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Doctor Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere; Penny and Bernadette improvise after Amy doesn't like the tame bachelorette party they planned for her.
